fields.name: Order No.
fields.tooltip: Specifies the Order No. of the table physical inventory recording header.

fields.name: Recording No.
fields.tooltip: Specifies the Recording No. of the table physical inventory recording header.

fields.name: Description
fields.tooltip: Specifies a description of the physical inventory recording.

fields.name: Status
fields.tooltip: Specifies if the recording is Open or Finished

fields.name: Person Responsible
fields.tooltip: Specifies the person who was responsible for the recording.

fields.name: Allow Recording Without Order
fields.tooltip: Specifies that recording lines were automatically created for items that did not exist on the physical inventory order. This can only happen if none of the values in these four fields exist for an item on the order: Item No., Variant Code, Location Code, and Bin Code.

fields.name: Date Recorded
fields.tooltip: Specifies the day when the recording was performed.

fields.name: Time Recorded
fields.tooltip: Specifies the Time Recorded of the table physical inventory recording header.

fields.name: Person Recorded
fields.tooltip: Specifies the Person Recorded of the table physical inventory recording header.

fields.name: Location Code
fields.tooltip: Specifies the location where the recording was performed.
